title: 小學堂甲骨文資料庫 / Xiaoxuetang Oracle Bone Script Database
scope: Oracle character heads and glyph forms based mainly on Jiaguwen Bian; current landing page reports 2548 character heads and 24701 forms.
download_strategy: Use as the primary external character reference system; download only metadata/derived records unless asset rights are reviewed.
risk_note: Official academic database; automated downloads may be restricted and raw glyph images require source and rights review.

title: 甲骨文合集材料來源表 / Source Table for Collection of Oracle Bone Inscriptions
scope: Heji material source table based on the 1999 printed source table; covers Heji plate/material source references.
download_strategy: Use for inscription/plate provenance; download small documentation and derived metadata only.
risk_note: Official source table; Heji identifiers are plate/material references and not universal character IDs.

title: Oracle Bones Rubbings Database
provider: Fu Ssu Nien Library / Institute of History and Philology Academia Sinica
scope: Oracle bone rubbings held by IHP; overview reports over 40000 rubbings and 21556 digitized records searchable.
download_strategy: Use for rubbing/image provenance and collection-number links; do not bulk download raw images before rights review.
risk_note: Official collection database with explicit site policy; raw image reuse requires policy review.

title: Oracle Bones Collection Page
provider: Museum of the Institute of History and Philology Academia Sinica
scope: Museum collection overview and selected oracle bone artifacts with catalog-style labels.
download_strategy: Use as museum provenance and sample artifact reference; download only small metadata unless image rights are reviewed.
risk_note: Official museum page; image reuse requires museum policy review.

title: 殷契文渊 / Oracle Bones Corpus
provider: Key Laboratory of Oracle Bone Inscriptions Information Processing Anyang Normal University; CASS Oracle Studies Center
scope: Integrated oracle-bone platform with glyph, catalog, literature and knowledge-service sections.
download_strategy: Adopt as a professional discovery and cross-reference source; do not bulk download documents/images because the site disclaimer reports mixed third-party material.
risk_note: Professional and important platform, but rights status is mixed; use metadata and cross-check against institutional/catalog sources.

title: 殷墟甲骨文数据库 / Yinxu Oracle Bone Inscriptions Database
provider: 浙江师范大学; 陈年福教授; 古联（北京）数字传媒科技有限公司
scope: Professional database with inscription browsing, transcription search, original text search, oracle dictionary functions and many catalog-source abbreviations.
download_strategy: Use as a professional discovery and cross-reference source; register stable catalog abbreviations and do not bulk copy paywalled/raw assets.
risk_note: Professional/editorial source but commercial platform; access and redistribution rights require visible caution.

title: Tsinghua University Library Oracle Bones Collection
scope: Official collection overview reporting over 1750 oracle bones and 1495 inscribed pieces; includes provenance through Hu Houxuan/Yu Shengwu/Chen Mengjia and UNESCO Memory context.
download_strategy: Use for collection-level provenance and institutional source trail; download page metadata only unless image rights are reviewed.
risk_note: Official library page; not a full searchable corpus endpoint by itself.

title: Hopkins Collection of Chinese Oracle Bones Finding List
scope: Finding list for the Hopkins Collection with period/topic table and cross-references to CUL numbers, Chalfant, Heji and Yingguo suo cang jiagu ji references.
download_strategy: Use for British/Cambridge provenance crosswalks and external reference mapping; download page metadata only unless asset rights are reviewed.
risk_note: Official university library finding list; linked digitized assets require separate rights and IIIF review.

title: British Museum oracle-bone object record OA+.165
scope: Official museum object record for oracle-bone fragments with museum number, registration number, period, material, acquisition and department fields.
download_strategy: Use as a museum-object ID pattern and sample provenance reference; do not assume comprehensive oracle-bone corpus coverage.
risk_note: Official museum collection record; image/licensing policies require object-level review.

title: Smithsonian National Museum of Asian Art oracle bone object records
provider: Smithsonian National Museum of Asian Art
scope: Official Smithsonian/NMAA oracle-bone object records with accession number, provenance notes, IIIF image access and CC0 rights statement; FSC-O-26 archive page is currently script-downloadable while the current si.edu object page may require browser verification.
download_strategy: Use as a public-domain sample source for asset metadata and IIIF workflow testing; still record object-level provenance and access boundary per object.
risk_note: Smithsonian/NMAA archive page marks FSC-O-26 image/media as CC0, but current si.edu pages may use request verification and object details may be revised.

title: HUST-OBC: An open dataset for oracle bone character recognition and decipherment
provider: Huazhong University of Science and Technology research team / Scientific Data
scope: Scientific Data dataset with 77064 images of 1588 deciphered characters and 62989 images of 9411 undeciphered characters; total 140053 images.
download_strategy: Register as large source package; do not commit raw dataset; extract indexes and derived metadata after license/source review.
risk_note: Dataset is directly relevant to 1500+ deciphered and undeciphered characters, but raw images are large, non-commercially licensed and compiled from diverse sources including an unreliable GuoXueDaShi split.

title: OBIMD: Oracle Bone Inscriptions Multi-modal Dataset
provider: Key Laboratory of Oracle Bone Inscriptions Information Processing Anyang Normal University; Xiamen University; Tencent Youtu Lab; University of Cambridge; Scientific Data
scope: Multi-modal OBI dataset with 10077 oracle bone images, 93652 annotated characters, 21941 syntactically validated sentences, and reading sequences.
download_strategy: Download dataset card and code README; do not bulk download raw images before source/rights/size review.
risk_note: Dataset card reports CC-BY 4.0 while the GitHub README includes narrower academic-use wording; raw files remain large and need rights review before import.

title: Open-Oracle project repository
scope: Project hub linking HUST-OBC, EVOBC, OBSD and related oracle-bone AI research resources.
download_strategy: Use as a reviewed project index for datasets/methods/task framing; do not treat as primary paleographic authority by itself.
risk_note: Useful for locating academic datasets and AI task strategies; underlying dataset rights and source chains must be reviewed separately.

title: EVOBC: Evolution Oracle Bone Characters Dataset
provider: Yuliang Liu research group / arXiv / Open-Oracle
scope: Large evolution dataset reported with 229170 images and 13714 character categories across six historical stages from oracle bone characters through clerical script.
download_strategy: Register as a candidate evolution-chain source; review linked dataset files and source chains before importing raw images.
risk_note: Useful for evolution-chain experiments, but source texts/websites and image rights need separate review before corpus import.

title: Oracle-MNIST dataset
provider: Published research team / GitHub / Figshare / Science Data Bank
scope: Small benchmark dataset of oracle character images for machine learning; not a comprehensive decipherment corpus.
download_strategy: Register for AI benchmarking only; do not use as source of scholarly decipherment claims.
risk_note: Useful for recognition tests but too narrow for corpus construction.

title: GBEDOBC graph-based evolutionary dataset
provider: Qingju Jiao et al. / npj Heritage Science / GitHub
scope: Graph-based evolutionary dataset linking oracle bone characters to later scripts.
download_strategy: Register as a candidate for graph/evolution-chain experiments; review data fields and rights before import.
risk_note: Useful for graph/evolution research and reports 756 groups/3780 graph-based characters, but not a primary corpus authority.

title: 甲骨世界 / Oracle Bones Database
provider: National Library of China / Chinese Ancient Books Resource Platform
scope: National Library of China oracle-bone holdings and Oracle World database evidence from official NLC PDFs; current notes report NLC holdings of 35651 oracle bones and Oracle World records for oracle-bone objects, images, rubbings and rubbing images.
download_strategy: Use as an official national-library collection and database-scope source; keep record import metadata-only until a stable current query endpoint and item-level access rules are confirmed.
risk_note: Official NLC materials confirm collection/database scope but not a stable current bulk endpoint; do not use mirrored summaries or third-party portals as source data.
